name: lobby-native-layout-v2
desc: Lobby scene-anchor recenter (FUN_0051c980 anchor table). Replaces uniform-scale lobby-native-layout: instead of multiplying 1024-canvas coords by ~1.875 (which left widgets clustered left-of-center because widget sprite widths do not scale), this TRANSLATES the whole original 1024x768 anchor block to the visual center of the 1920x1080 native canvas: x_new=x_orig+DX (DX=448=(1920-1024)/2), y_new=y_orig+DY (DY=156=(1080-768)/2). Same-length immediate flips only -> render geometry intact, low risk. Pair with lobby-res.json (1024x768->1920x1080 backbuffer). DX/DY are the live micro-tune knobs: nudge DX +/- to balance horizontal, DY +/- for vertical, regenerate. Integer truncation matches legacy cast.
verified: originalHex 16B-guarded against pristine _pristine.exe (2848be76); all 13 immediates byte-verified. Centering geometry requires one live screenshot to confirm/micro-tune DX,DY.

knobs.DX_meaning: global X translate px on 1920 canvas
knobs.DY_meaning: global Y translate px on 1080 canvas

patches.note: main lobby panel anchor x 300 -> 748 (1920-center, DX=448)
